items.title: Yankees Place Trent Grisham On 10-Day IL, Activate Jasson Domínguez
items.summary: The Yankees have placed outfielder Trent Grisham on the 10-day injured list with a right hamstring strain, the team announced. Fellow outfielder Jasson Domínguez, whom the Yankees reinstated from the 10-day IL, will take Grisham’s roster spot. Grisham suffered the injury sliding into second base in a loss to the Blue Jays on Friday, forcing […]
